description:
The goal of Veolia, a leading utility service provider in water management, waste management, and energy services, is to build a simple, centralized solution for cost-monitoring on AWS, aiming to reduce costs by providing automated reports and notifications to internal teams. 

~Filmed prior to COVID-19~
